params.volume: Sets the final output level for Dustline. Reduce it when Drive, Resonance, or low notes make the voice too hot.
params.wave: Morphs the oscillator source from saw-like tones toward pulse-like tones. Higher values make the sound narrower and more buzzy.
params.noise: Blends noise into the oscillator source before the filter. Use it for air, grit, percussion-like attacks, or dirty bass texture.
params.cutoff: Sets the resonant low-pass filter cutoff. Lower values darken the voice; higher values expose more oscillator and noise brightness.
params.resonance: Controls the filter peak around the cutoff. Higher values emphasize the cutoff frequency and can become sharper or more nasal.
params.attack: Sets how quickly the amplitude envelope rises after note-on. Low values are immediate; higher values fade the voice in.
params.release: Sets how long the amplitude envelope falls after note-off. Higher values create longer tails and smoother note transitions.
params.drive: Adds saturation after filtering. Use it for louder, denser bass and lead tones, but watch output headroom at high values.
params.bend_range: Sets pitch-bend depth in semitones for incoming MIDI pitch bend.
